title: alchemilla fissa subsp. pyrenaica
intro: Alchemilla fissa subsp. pyrenaica, also known as mountain lady's mantle, is a plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and burns, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Alchemilla fissa subsp. pyrenaica can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and creams, making it a popular ingredient in natural skincare products and remedies.
